Description: Checkout page loads from cart (guest user)
Preconditions: Cart has valid in-stock product
Steps: 1. Navigate to /cart 2. Click Checkout CTA
Expected Result: Checkout page loads; no broken layout; step 1 (email/contact) visible.

Description: Guest email field is visible and required field validation triggers on empty submit
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout; email step visible
Steps: 1. Open checkout 2. Leave email field empty 3. Click Continue
Expected Result: Required validation message appears on email field; user does not advance to next step.

Description: Shipping address form is visible and required field validation works
Preconditions: Guest checkout; email entered; address step visible
Steps: 1. Enter valid email 2. Proceed to address step 3. Submit with empty required fields
Expected Result: Required field validation messages visible for all empty required address fields.

Description: Valid shipping address entry displays available delivery methods
Preconditions: Guest checkout; address step open
Steps: 1. Fill valid AU or NZ shipping address 2. Continue
Expected Result: Available delivery methods (Standard / Express) appear; at least one option selectable.
Test Data: Test address (AU: Melbourne VIC 3000; NZ: Auckland 1010)

Description: Selecting a delivery method updates the shipping cost in the order summary
Preconditions: Delivery methods visible
Steps: 1. Select Standard shipping 2. Observe order summary 3. Select Express 4. Observe order summary
Expected Result: Shipping cost in summary updates to reflect selected method; grand total updates accordingly.

Description: Order summary shows product name + quantity + price + subtotal correctly
Preconditions: Cart has a product; checkout open
Steps: 1. Open checkout 2. Expand or view order summary panel
Expected Result: Product name, qty, and line price visible and matching cart; subtotal visible and correct.

Description: Grand total equals subtotal + shipping cost (minus any discounts)
Preconditions: Checkout has address + delivery method selected
Steps: 1. Note subtotal and shipping cost 2. Verify grand total
Expected Result: Grand total matches expected arithmetic.

Description: Empty cart cannot proceed to checkout — redirected or blocked
Preconditions: Guest user; cart is empty
Steps: 1. Navigate to /checkout with empty cart
Expected Result: User is redirected to /cart or blocked; no empty checkout rendered.

Description: Afterpay (BNPL) payment option is visible in the payment section
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step; cart has eligible product
Steps: 1. Complete address + delivery steps 2. Reach payment section 3. Inspect payment methods
Expected Result: Afterpay payment option visible and enabled.

Description: Place Order button is visible and enabled when all required checkout fields are filled
Preconditions: All checkout steps complete; valid payment method selected
Steps: 1. Complete all checkout steps (email + address + delivery + payment) 2. Observe Place Order CTA
Expected Result: Place Order button visible and clickable (not disabled).

Description: Place Order CTA is accessible on mobile viewport and checkout form is usable
Preconditions: Mobile viewport 390×844; cart has product
Steps: 1. Open checkout on mobile 2. Complete email + address + delivery steps 3. Scroll to Place Order CTA
Expected Result: All form steps usable on mobile; Place Order CTA visible and tappable.

Description: Invalid email format on checkout email field shows validation message
Preconditions: Guest user at checkout email step
Steps: 1. Enter malformed email (e.g. 'not-an-email') 2. Click Continue
Expected Result: Email format validation message displayed; user does not advance.

Description: Required card field validation shown when Place Order clicked with empty card fields
Preconditions: Checkout at payment step; credit card option selected; card fields empty
Steps: 1. Select card payment 2. Leave card fields blank 3. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Required validation on empty card fields; order is NOT placed.

Description: Order success page loads and shows order number after completing checkout
Preconditions: Valid cart; test card credentials available for staging payment gateway
Steps: 1. Complete full checkout flow using test card credentials 2. Click Place Order
Expected Result: Order success page loads; order number visible; no error page.
Test Data: Test card from testData (staging payment gateway)
Notes: Partial — requires test payment credentials; skip if staging gateway unavailable

Description: Logged-in user checkout prefills saved email and shipping address
Preconditions: Logged-in user with saved address; cart has product
Steps: 1. Log in 2. Add product 3. Open checkout
Expected Result: Email and shipping address fields pre-populated with saved account data.
Notes: Partial — depends on account having saved address from prior test run

Description: Click & Collect option is visible in the delivery methods section
Preconditions: Checkout; valid address entered; C&C feature enabled
Steps: 1. Complete address step 2. Observe delivery methods
Expected Result: Click & Collect (or Store Pickup) option visible in delivery options.
Notes: Skip if clickAndCollect feature flag is disabled

Description: Coupon/promo code field is visible in checkout
Preconditions: Checkout loaded; cart has product
Steps: 1. Open checkout 2. Look for coupon/promo code input
Expected Result: Coupon input field visible.

Description: Billing address defaults to same as shipping address
Preconditions: Checkout at billing/payment step
Steps: 1. Complete address + delivery steps 2. Observe billing section
Expected Result: Billing address is defaulted to same-as-shipping; checkbox or toggle shows active.

Description: Purchase event fires on order success page after completing checkout
Preconditions: Analytics tools available; test order placed
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Complete checkout 3. Read success page events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /purchase|order_success|checkout_complete/i captured.
Notes: Partial — event fires verified; payload schema not validated; requires test order completion

Description: Vans checkout shows PayPal (Braintree) and PayPal Pay-in-4 payment options
Preconditions: Vans project; checkout at payment step; cart has eligible product
Steps: 1. Complete address + delivery steps on Vans checkout 2. Inspect payment methods
Expected Result: PayPal and/or PayPal Pay-in-4 option visible in addition to Afterpay and card.
Notes: Vans supports Afterpay + Braintree CC + Braintree PayPal + PayPal Pay-in-4 per site-structure.md
